allow: Bash(php -r 'echo PHP_EOL; $f = new finfo\(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE\); $tmp = tempnam\(sys_get_temp_dir\(\), '\\''test'\\''\); file_put_contents\($tmp, '\\''test'\\''\); echo '\\''finfo disponible: '\\'' . \($f ? '\\''oui'\\'' : '\\''non'\\''\) . PHP_EOL;')

Bash(php -r "echo 'upload_max_filesize: ' . ini_get\('upload_max_filesize'\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'post_max_size: ' . ini_get\('post_max_size'\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'max_file_uploads: ' . ini_get\('max_file_uploads'\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'memory_limit: ' . ini_get\('memory_limit'\) . PHP_EOL;")

Bash(php -r "echo 'max_execution_time: ' . ini_get\('max_execution_time'\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'max_input_time: ' . ini_get\('max_input_time'\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'default_socket_timeout: ' . ini_get\('default_socket_timeout'\) . PHP_EOL;")
